## ⚠️ Important

**If you have found a real vulnerability** (XSS, injection, auth bypass, data exposure, cryptographic weakness, etc.), **do NOT use this form.**

Email [security@passgeni.ai](mailto:security@passgeni.ai) directly. See our full [Security Policy](../../SECURITY.md).
